'''Bronzium Squadron''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] consisting of [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] that was assigned to the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] warship [[Bounty (warship)|''Bounty'']] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]. It participated in Alliance operations monitoring [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] movements in the [[Both system|Bothawui system]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]''
